items.title: WhatsApp launches 'incognito' AI chat with private disappearing messages
items.summary: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
